/usr/bin/c++   -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic   CMakeFiles/demo_thread.dir/demos/demo_thread.cpp.o  -o demo_thread  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zihaoye/devel/workspace/build/real_time_tools:::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: libreal_time_tools.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.71.0 -lpthread -lpthread -ledit -lcurses -lnsl -lglut -lGL -lGLU -lX11 -lXmu -lm
